name: Glass Touch
description: Crystal-clear glass taps with pristine resonance

prompts.SessionStart: crystal glass rim tone rising with clear harmonic ring, glass bell, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SessionEnd: crystal glass tone decaying smoothly with pristine clarity, glass bell, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.Stop: single crystal glass strike with bright ringing sustain, glass bell, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PreToolUse: quick glass tap with brief crystalline click, glass bell tick, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PostToolUse: short glass chime confirming with clear bright ring, glass bell, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two crystal glass tones with questioning upward inflection, glass bell, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady glass harmonic ringing with sustained clear tone, glass bell, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStart: crystal glass tone splitting into two diverging harmonics, glass bell, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStop: clear glass ping returning with distinct bright ring, glass bell, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright crystal glass strike with energetic ringing burst, glass bell, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
